TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Seqalapit ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 58 buwan, 151 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 141 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 90%, Amis 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Seqalapit hya' ga Tjacupu. tay mkyahu' na Seqalapit hya' ga Seqeciin. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Seqalapit ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Seqalapit ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕeqalapit ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajβu ɣo (*awu), kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕeqalapit ħjaʔ ɣa tjaʦ~ʨupu. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕeqalapit ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕeqeʦ~ʨiin. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ s~ɕeqalapit ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ s~ɕeqalapit ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Seqalapit ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 58 buwan, 151 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 141 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 90%, Amis 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Seqalapit hya' ga Tjacupu. tay mkyahu' na Seqalapit hya' ga Seqeciin. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Seqalapit ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Seqalapit ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕeqalapit ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajβu ɣo (*awu), kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕeqalapit ħjaʔ ɣa tjaʦ~ʨupu. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕeqalapit ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕeqeʦ~ʨiin. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ s~ɕeqalapit ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ s~ɕeqalapit ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
